chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1040 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 21.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Hussain Laghari, Advocate for applicant. Mr. S. Ali Murtaza Shah, Advocate for complainant. Mr. Hubdar Ali Bhutto, Advocate for legal heir of deceased. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for the applicant, after arguing the matter to some length, requires the bail application to be disposed of with direction that the learned trial Court may attempt for conclusion of the trial within a reasonable period. Learned Counsels for the other side as well as learned Assistant P.G. extends no objection. Accordingly, learned trial Court is directed to conclude the trial within a period of three months hereof. Interim order dated 27.10.2025 stands recalled. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
